response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content from 00:00.000 to 01:06.000. 2. Observed a static image and instrumental background music throughout the entire duration. 3. Confirmed no vocal music is present. 4. Created a single scene covering the entire duration.
response.global_summary: A static promotional screen for Tokino Sora's 'Dream's in Motion New Year's Party 2026', featuring instrumental background music and a notification that the free preview has ended.

scenes.description: A static screen featuring an illustration of Tokino Sora and the text 'Dream's in Motion New Year's Party 2026'. The text at the bottom announces the end of the free preview. Instrumental background music plays throughout.
